name: Hardware-Software Co-Design for Float16 On-Device Training on RISC-V Single-Core
summary: arXiv:2607.21130v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: By leveraging standard RISC-V extensions, namely Zfh (scalar float16) and Zvfh (vector float16), this work proposes an open-source framework to ena...
description: arXiv:2607.21130v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: By leveraging standard RISC-V extensions, namely Zfh (scalar float16) and Zvfh (vector float16), this work proposes an open-source framework to enable complete on-device training on resource-constrained RISC-V single-core. Our approach allows memory footprint reduction by about 50% as compared to using float32 and with minimal model performance...
author: Benjamin Hubinet, Pierre-Alain Moellic, Olivier Savry, Olivier Potin, Jean-Baptiste Rigaud
